title: HLX-299: helix-cli packaging, docs, and artifact commands
description: Walkthrough of all changes: version fix, artifact commands, CI workflow, and README

steps.title: prepublishOnly safety script
steps.description: Added prepublishOnly script that runs npm run build before any npm publish. Prevents broken publishes where dist/ is empty.

steps.title: Dynamic version via createRequire
steps.description: Import createRequire from node:module to read package.json version at runtime. This replaces the hardcoded '0.1.0' that was out of sync with package.json's 1.2.0.

steps.title: Version resolution from package.json
steps.description: createRequire resolves ../package.json relative to dist/index.js at runtime. The version is read once at startup and used in the --version case.

steps.title: Artifacts command routing
steps.description: New case in the main switch routes 'artifacts' to runArtifacts, following the same pattern as 'comments' and 'inspect' — requireConfig() then delegate to module.

steps.title: Usage text with artifact commands
steps.description: Updated usage function to document the new artifact commands with their flag syntax.

steps.title: Artifact command router
steps.description: Routes to ticket or run subcommands. Mirrors src/comments/index.ts pattern: resolveTicketId with --ticket flag/HELIX_TICKET_ID env var, getFlag helper, switch/case routing.

steps.title: Ticket artifact listing command
steps.description: Calls GET /api/tickets/:ticketId/artifacts via hxFetch. Supports optional --run filter. Displays items (repo, branch, URL) and step artifact summary.

steps.title: Run step-artifact retrieval command
steps.description: Calls GET /api/tickets/:ticketId/runs/:runId/step-artifacts/:stepId?repoKey=X. Validates --step and --repo-key as required flags. Prints raw file content for each artifact.

steps.title: GitHub Actions npm publish workflow
steps.description: Triggered on push to main. Builds, typechecks, verifies dist/index.js exists, compares local version to published npm version, and publishes only if version changed. Uses NPM_TOKEN secret.

steps.title: Comprehensive CLI documentation
steps.description: Covers installation, auth (OAuth + manual + env vars + config file), all commands with examples, artifact retrieval, and maintainer publishing setup with step-by-step npm token and GitHub secret instructions.
